name: Vitals nudge
description: If no reading was logged all day, an evening task nudges you to log your vitals — streaks survive busy days.
prompt: Each evening, check whether I logged any vitals today. If the day is empty, add a task reminding me to log a reading before bed; if I already logged something, stay quiet.

vault.why: Checks whether any reading was logged today and files an evening reminder task when the day is empty.
